questions: Stay calm and patient no matter what. Someone at work takes credit for your idea in a meeting. How do you respond?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Your neighbor's dog keeps barking at 6 AM every morning and waking you up. What do you do?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. A stranger cuts in front of you in a long checkout line at the grocery store. What do you say?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Your roommate eats the leftovers you were saving for lunch without asking. How do you handle it?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Someone bumps into you on a crowded sidewalk and doesn't apologize. What's your reaction?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. A coworker keeps interrupting you during a team meeting. How do you respond?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. The restaurant gets your order wrong for the second time and the waiter seems annoyed when you mention it. What do you do?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Your sibling borrows your car and returns it almost out of gas. How do you handle it?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. A customer service agent keeps putting you on hold and then giving you incorrect information. What do you say?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Someone at the gym is using the equipment you need and has been sitting on their phone for ten minutes. How do you approach them?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Your friend cancels plans with you at the last minute for the third time in a row. How do you bring it up?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. A driver honks aggressively at you the instant the light turns green. What's your reaction?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. Your landlord ignores your third request to fix a leaky faucet. What do you do next?
Stay calm and patient no matter what. A coworker makes a sarcastic comment about your presentation in front of the team. How do you respond?
